role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script (Latin) and language (Portuguese) on the sign.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, soil type, and coastal features.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed vegetation types (scrub, grasses) and biome.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings, sign layout, and utility pole standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized vehicle models and infrastructure styles.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Brazil. All agents stayed within their domains, provided concrete evidence, and the tournament successfully used that evidence to eliminate incorrect candidates.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified Portuguese text and Latin script.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described sandy soil, scrub, and lagoon.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly noted blue sign, pole style, and road markings.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified truck model and pole style.
